close_reason: Chose direct deps only for v1 - user provides pinned requirements.txt
description:
Decide how to handle transitive dependencies:

Option A: Direct deps only (simple)
- Only include packages explicitly listed in pyproject.toml/requirements.txt
- User manages transitive deps manually
- Matches current go-deps approach with --indirect flag

Option B: Full resolution (complex)
- Use pip's resolver to get full dependency tree
- Generate all transitive deps in python-deps.toml
- More complete but more complex

Recommendation: Start with Option A (direct only), add --resolve flag later for Option B
title: Handle transitive dependencies decision
